title: AIIMS BSc Nursing Admit Card 2025 Released @ aiimsexams.ac.in

detail.title: AIIMS BSc Nursing Admit Card 2025 Released @ aiimsexams.ac.in
detail.short_info: AIIMS BSc Nursing Admit Card 2025 - BSc Nursing Course Entrance Test Admit Card 2025 released on 27-05-2025 by the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi (AIIMS) Authority and all the registered students who had submitted their AIIMS AIIMS BSc Nursing Application Forms successfully will receive their Admit Card/Hall Ticket which can be downloaded from the official website. The AIIMS BSc Nursing Admit Card 2025 is an important document to be brought by the candidate when appearing for the Examination. For more details and information related to the AIIMS BSc Nursing Admit Card 2025, read this article.

sections.heading: AIIMS BSc Nursing Admit Card 2025 Released @ aiimsexams.ac.in

content.text: New Update: BSc Nursing Course Entrance Test Admit Card 2025 released by the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi (AIIMS) Authority on 27-05-2025 and the candidates will be able to download it from the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi (AIIMS) Official Website. All the candidates who had successfully submitted their Application Forms will be receiving their Admit Cards that will be available in the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi (AIIMS) official Website and it has been released by the Authority. If candidate faces any query regarding the BSc Nursing Course Entrance Test Admit Card 2025, then he or she has to contact the concerned Authority without fail. The AIIMS BSc Nursing Admit Card 2025 will be present in Online mode only and will not be provided to candidates through any other offline modes.
Check and Download - AIIMS BSc Nursing Admit Card 2025

rows: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi (AIIMS)

sections.heading: How to download AIIMS BSc Nursing Admit Card/Hall Ticket 2025?

content.text: Following are the steps to download the AIIMS BSc Nursing Admit Card 2025:

items: Visit the official site of AIIMS.
All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi (AIIMS) home page will display.
By scrolling down the home page, find the Admission section.
Search for the BSc Nursing Course Entrance Test Admit Card 2025 link.
AIIMS BSc Nursing 2025 Admit Card will be displayed.
Download and take a print out.
